commandsRun.command: Representative search commands executed with the same HOME and ORT_DYLIB_PATH; see command-results.json and per-command stdout/stderr artifacts.

assertions.title: Extension mapping for all new languages

steps.action: Index the assigned fixture in local mode
steps.expected: Representative files index successfully for runtime inspection
steps.observed: vera index --local . succeeded and created 15 chunks from 10 parsed files.

steps.action: Search representative files without language filters
steps.expected: src/main.m surfaces as matlab, nginx.conf as nginx, app.ini as ini, and sampled new-language files surface with their canonical labels.
steps.observed: nginx.conf surfaced as nginx, app.ini surfaced as ini, and sampled scheme/racket/clojure/commonlisp/svelte/astro/prisma searches surfaced with the expected language labels, but src/main.m surfaced as objectivec instead of matlab.

steps.action: Check representative filtered searches where appropriate
steps.expected: Representative files remain searchable through their canonical language filters.
steps.observed: Scheme, nginx, ini, racket, clojure, commonlisp, svelte, astro, and prisma all returned filtered hits, but --lang MaTlAb returned an empty array for src/main.m.

assertions.issues: Runtime detection still classifies src/main.m as objectivec rather than matlab, so representative matlab behavior remains incorrect.

assertions.title: Stats shows new languages after indexing

steps.action: Run vera stats --json from the indexed fixture
steps.expected: Stats show nginx, matlab, ini, and the sampled new languages with non-zero counts.
steps.observed: stats --json reported astro=2, clojure=2, nginx=2, racket=2, svelte=2, commonlisp=1, ini=1, prisma=1, scheme=1, but no matlab entry; objectivec appeared with count 1 instead.

assertions.issues: The indexed stats surface still omits matlab and instead counts the .m fixture under objectivec.

assertions.title: Language filter works for new languages

steps.action: Run mixed-case filtered searches such as --lang ScHeMe and --lang NgInX
steps.expected: Case-insensitive filters return only matching-language results.
steps.observed: --lang ScHeMe returned 1 scheme result(s) only, and --lang NgInX returned 2 nginx result(s) only.

steps.action: Run filtered searches for additional sampled new languages
steps.expected: Racket, clojure, commonlisp, svelte, astro, prisma, and ini filters return only matching-language results.
steps.observed: racket=2, clojure=2, commonlisp=1, svelte=2, astro=2, prisma=1, and ini=1 all returned only their requested language labels.

steps.action: Run a representative matlab filter check
steps.expected: The matlab fixture is returned by --lang MaTlAb.
steps.observed: --lang MaTlAb returned 0 result(s), while the same query without a filter returned src/main.m labeled as objectivec.

assertions.issues: Case-insensitive filtering now works for sampled languages including scheme and nginx, but representative matlab filtering still fails because src/main.m is indexed as objectivec.

summary: Tested 3 rerun assertions in the isolated local-mode fixture. Mixed-case and sampled new-language filters now work for scheme/nginx/racket/clojure/commonlisp/svelte/astro/prisma/ini, but src/main.m is still classified as objectivec, so VAL-LANG-002, VAL-LANG-005, and VAL-LANG-006 remain failing on the representative matlab path.
